title: Align Leggings Black Lulu High Rise 25" Yoga Pant Sports Size 2/4/6/8/10/12
description: The Align lulu Leggings lemon in Black High Rise are versatile yoga pants designed for fitness and sports activities. With a 25-inch waist, these leggings are made of nylon material and feature compression in the leg area for added support during workouts. The regular fit and skinny leg style offer comfort and flexibility, while the adjustable waist ensures a secure fit. Perfect for year-round use, these leggings are ideal for yoga and other active pursuits, making them a staple in any woman's activewear collection.
